titles.title: Sweeter as the Days Go By

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: The more I trust Him, the more I love Him, Nothing good for me He'll deny The longer I know Him, the better I can show Him, I couldn't stop now if I tried.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: It gets sweeter as the days go by, It gets sweeter as the moments fly, His love is richer, deeper, fuller, sweeter, Sweeter, sweeter, sweeter as the days go by.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Oh, the moment He saved my His good grace He gave me, He place His love down deep in my heart, There's great joy in knowing with Him I am going, And never more from Him to depart.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: It gets sweeter as the days go by, It gets sweeter as the moments fly, His love is richer, deeper, fuller, sweeter, Sweeter, sweeter, sweeter as the days go by, Sweeter, sweeter, sweeter as the days go by.
